evals.prompt: Create a CSS design system for a SaaS dashboard. I need a modern color palette (blue primary), typography scale, spacing variables, and shadows using CSS custom properties.
evals.expected_output: Comprehensive CSS file with :root variables for tokens.
expectations: Includes a blue primary color palette with shades (e.g., 50 to 900)

evals.prompt: Set up dark mode support for my CSS variables. Currently I just have: --bg: #fff; --text: #333; --border: #ddd; --primary: #007bff;
evals.expected_output: CSS demonstrating light and dark mode custom property toggling.
expectations: Inverts/adjusts the provided colors for dark mode context
